title: Add a highlevel info header before inserting columns and rows.
author: shan10u
body:
I am generating a xls file using nodeJS and **exceljs**.

Before defining columns and rows on the sheet I want to show a header on the top  which will include high level information about the data. Example - **Total Items, Sum Total, User Name, etc**.
It should look something like.
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/30957711/67708747-afde0900-f9e2-11e9-936f-864f8953e8a5.png)

Please let me know how can I achieve the same.

Thanks
